title: ModalMassAndFrequency
description: ModalMassAndFrequency: General modal dynamics result of the structure.

Frequency.description: Property has a quantity of type Frequency measured in [Hz].

MassX.description: Total modal mass in the X-direction for eigenvector normalisation. Property has a quantity of type Mass measured in [kg].

MassY.description: Total modal mass in the Y-direction for eigenvector normalisation. Property has a quantity of type Mass measured in [kg].

MassZ.description: Total modal mass in the Z-direction for eigenvector normalisation. Property has a quantity of type Mass measured in [kg].

RotationalMassX.description: Total modal mass for rotation about the X-axis for eigenvector normalisation. Property has a quantity of type Mass measured in [kg].

RotationalMassY.description: Total modal mass for rotation about the X-axis for eigenvector normalisation. Property has a quantity of type Mass measured in [kg].

RotationalMassZ.description: Total modal mass for rotation about the X-axis for eigenvector normalisation. Property has a quantity of type Mass measured in [kg].

ModeNumber.description: Positive index, starting at one. Only set for cases with modal outputs such as dynamic cases.

TimeStep.description: Time step for time history results.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
